en: The dominatrix who brought a nation to its knees.
ko: 한 나라를 무릎 꿇게 한 여왕님

en: I said no. Very, very close, but no.
You got carried away. The game was too elaborate.
You're enjoying yourself too much. No such thing as too much.
Oh, enjoying the thrill of the chase is fine.
Craving the distraction of the game, I sympathize entirely, but sentiment...
Sentiment is a chemical defect found in the losing side. Sentiment?
What are you talking about? You.
Oh, dear God. Look at the poor man.
You don't actually think I was interested in you. Why?
Because you're the great Sherlock Holmes, the clever detective in the funny hat?
